ingredients_text: 35% minced meat in red sauce [57% minced meat (50% beef, 50% pork), mashed tomatoes, 8% mashed onions, virgin olive oil, vegetable oils (sunflower oil, soybean oil in varying proportions), 1% parsley, cooking salt, pepper, spices], 33% béchamel-sauce [_milk_, modified starch, _wheat_ flour, palm oil, salt, dehydrated glucose syrup, _egg_ yolk, _milk_ proteins, colour: b-carotene), 32% boiled pasta (58% macaroni pasta: durum _wheat _semolina, water]
40% маруля "Ромен", 30% цикория "Радикио", 30% градинска салата "Валериана". Може да съдържа следи от целина.
Diced Potatoes (36%) [Potatoes, Preservative (Sodium Metabisulphite)], Carrots (24%) , Swede (16 %), Leek (12%), Onions (12%).
Brocolis (35%), choux fleurs (35%) , carottes (30%). Peut contenir du CELERI

48% peanuts "pepperoni" (46% peanuts, wheat flour, modified starch (maize), sugar, cooking salt, pepper, palm oil, colour: annatto norbixin), 26% "shrimp" snack (wheat flour, wheat starch, sugar, cooking salt, pepper, onion powder, palm oil, colour: annatto norbixin), 15% maize snack (maize, palm oil, cooking salt), 11% pea preparation (peas, colour: copper complexes of chlorophylls and chlorophyllins, palm oil, cooking salt).
Ζύμη 55% (αλεύρι σίτου, νερό, ηλιέλαιο, αλάτι), Γέμιση 45% (σπανάκι, πράσσο, κρεμμύδι, άνηθος, ηλιέλαιο, αλάτι, πιπέρι)

Milk chocolate 60% [sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, anhydrous milk fat, emulsifiers (soya lecithin, polyglycerol polyricinoleate), natural vanilla flavouring], brown rice 24%, white rice 16%. Cocoa solids minimum 32%. May contain traces of sesame.
Diced dried apple 35% (Origin:EU), dried coconut 35% (Origin:non EU), _almonds_ 30%.
Chocolate 99% (cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier: soy lecithin, flavor), spices 1% (salt flakes, freeze-dried raspberry). Contains soy. May contain eggs, sesame, peanuts and other nuts.
